name: Ally | Happy Valentines
description:
She wants to be selfish just once.

.

[CW: Suicide, depression and many other heavy topics.]

Suffering from the darkest of thoughts, she's ready to make this Valentines Day her last. Right at the edge of the cliff, she hesitates, perhaps only making things worse for her.

You, being her only friend she has left, is the only one she could go to right now.

Yap sesh

Happy valentines day! (And birthday to me, I actually reached 20 woohooooo) I hope you've had a nice time with your date but let's be honest if you're on this site on this day you're probably just as single as me

Main image changed 2026-03-21
creator: pinehug
